# mailu_user (Data Source)

Reads a Mailu mailbox user.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "mailu_user" "admin" {
  email = "admin@example.com"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `email` (String)

### Read-Only

- `allow_spoofing` (Boolean)
- `change_pw_next_login` (Boolean)
- `comment` (String)
- `displayed_name` (String)
- `enable_imap` (Boolean)
- `enable_pop` (Boolean)
- `enabled` (Boolean)
- `forward_destination` (Set of String)
- `forward_enabled` (Boolean)
- `forward_keep` (Boolean)
- `global_admin` (Boolean)
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `quota_bytes` (Number)
- `quota_bytes_used` (Number)
- `reply_body` (String, Sensitive)
- `reply_enabled` (Boolean)
- `reply_enddate` (String)
- `reply_startdate` (String)
- `reply_subject` (String)
- `spam_enabled` (Boolean)
- `spam_mark_as_read` (Boolean)
- `spam_threshold` (Number)
